versions.version_description: This is how boy's seeking torture play it, it's also mashable with Ed Sheerans "Thinking Out Loud".

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Tabbed by Kwint and Troy

Artist : Taylor Swift
Song   : Blank Space
Album  : 1989

Version 1 got some mistakes, and I wanted to make a non capo version.

NO CAPO

[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]

[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Nice to meet you where you been[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can show you incredible things [/tab]

Magic, madness, heaven sin saw you there and I thought
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]
Oh my God, look at that face[/tab]

You look like my next mistake
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                          
Love’s a game, want to plaaaaay?[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
New money, suit and tie[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can read you like a magazine[/tab]

Ain't it funny rumors fly

And I know you heard about  
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]
Me so hey, lets be friends[/tab]

I'm dying to see how this one ends
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Grab your passport and my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
I can make the bad guys good for a weekend[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                              
So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You can tell me when it's over mmm, if the high was worth the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you i'm insane                                    [/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]                                        
Cause you know I love the players and you love the game[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
It'll leave you breathless, or with a nasty scar[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you i'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch] 
But I got a blank space baby and I"ll write your name[/tab]


[Verse]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Cherry lips, crystal skies[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Dm[/ch]
I could show you incredible things[/tab]

Stolen kisses, pretty lies
[tab]                              [ch]A#[/ch]
You're the king baby I'm your queen[/tab]

Find out what you want                  

Be that girl for a month
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                   
Wait the worst is yet to come, oh no[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]                        
Screaming crying perfect storms[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Dm[/ch]
I can make all the tables turn[/tab]

Rose garden filled with thorns

Keep you second guessing
[tab]      [ch]A#[/ch]
Like "Oh my god who is she?"[/tab]

I get drunk on jealousy
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
But you'll come back each time you leave[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]                              [ch]C[/ch]
Cause darlin' I'm a nightmare, dressed like a daydream[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                              
So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You can tell me when it's over mmm, if the high was worth the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you i'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]          
Cause you know I love the players and you love the game[/tab]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
It'll leave you breathless, or with a nasty scar[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you i'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch] 
But I got a blank space baby and I"ll write your name[/tab]



[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               
Boys only want love if it's torture[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]            
Don't say I, say I didn't warn ya[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               
Boys only want love if it's torture[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Don't say I, say I didn't warn ya[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                                              
So it's gonna be forever or it's gonna go down in flames[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You can tell me when it's over mmm, if the high was worth the pain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
Got a long list of ex-lovers, they'll tell you i'm insane[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#[/ch]      
Cause you know I love the players and you love the game[/tab]

Cause were young and we're reckless, we'll take this way too far[/tab]
